characters.appearance: A fair-skinned human hand with short, unpainted fingernails.

scenes.supernova_script:
Narrator says: English बोलने में अटकते हो? Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice करो। [Struggle speaking English? Practice daily with Supernova.]
App Voice says: Good morning. Can you tell me about your experience? [Good morning. Can you tell me about your experience?]
App Voice says: experience. [experience.]
Narrator says: मुश्किल words पे tap करो, और उनका सही pronunciation सीखो। [Tap on difficult words and learn their correct pronunciation.]
App Voice says: I am very confident in my communication skills. [I am very confident in my communication skills.]
App Voice says: confident. [confident.]
Narrator says: AI tutor के साथ interview और office की real-world situations practice करो। [Practice real-world interview and office situations with the AI tutor.]
App Voice says: Your profile is quite impressive. [Your profile is quite impressive.]
App Voice says: impressive. [impressive.]
Narrator says: Supernova app डाउनलोड करो और confidence से English बोलो। [Download the Supernova app and speak English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the user by addressing the common fear of hesitating while speaking English.
- Demonstrates the interactive 'tap-to-learn' feature using a practical, real-world scenario (a job interview) instead of a fictional story.
- Highlights the AI tutor and practical vocabulary building.
- Ends with a strong, encouraging call-to-action to download Supernova and speak confidently.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ सिर्फ 10 मिनट में अपनी English सुधारें
AI Tutor के साथ सीखें
पढ़ें
सुनें
रोज़ 10 मिनट
नए words सीखें
Good morning. Can you tell me about your experience? I am very confident in my communication skills. Your profile is quite impressive.
experience [ɪkˈspɪriəns] अनुभव
confident [ˈkɑnfɪdənt] आत्मविश्वासी
impressive [ɪmˈprɛsɪv] प्रभावशाली
मुझे पता है
सीखना है
